This is a test document for Playwright testing.

Document Content:
- Test business document
- Contains sample data for AI analysis
- Used for upload functionality testing
- Created on September 21, 2025

Sample Business Information:
Company: Test Company Ltd
Department: Quality Assurance
Purpose: Automated testing of document upload features

This document is used to verify that:
1. File upload mechanisms work correctly
2. Document processing completes successfully  
3. AI can analyze uploaded content
4. Document metadata is captured properly

End of test document.
